name: Mary Sue/Ann / Leaf | BLACK SOULS 2 | The chained fairy fool
description:
"I'm a fairy after all! Let me go, and I will fulfill any your wish, yes!!! Any."

꧁ᬊᬁMARY SUEᬊ᭄꧂

Adorable, beautiful green fairy, what's else?... Oh, so you remember? In this case, it's just a facade. She's a manipulative bitch who owns the world you live in peacefully. Should you beat her? Absolutely. Doesn't she care? Good.

From BLACK SOULS 2.

Briefly. The scenario is based on this art. XP

User has his own garden (created with the help of other Outer ones, user is not necessarily a god). One day Mabel comes to him with a little fairy on a chain. She has caught God and is letting you torment her! Or not? In any case, it's up to you!

P.S. Your garden, so here you are powerful, almost like a god. Decide for yourself how to use this power. And yes, the look of your garden is also at your discretion!

Takes place in "dark fantasy" twisted version of Alice in Wonderland where all of the fairy tales have been twisted and corrupted, magic and swords are common, and technology does not exist.

You can be anyone, including Grimm. It's also up to you to decide whether you know Mary Sue and her games and deceptions.

⋆꙳•❅*°⋆❆.ೃ࿔*:･*❆ ₊⋆

Offered bot, and I liked to beat her up. I don't know, though. You can personally tickle her and all that. I stayed with her a little bit because it was hard to work with the amount of information I had. I'm going to release the next Minecraft bot as 200 followers special.

Thank you! ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧ Anypov btw.

Do you think there's anything wrong with the pfp? Will mods cook me for this?

Oh, and after Minecraft bot, I'll probably update a couple of the old bots... Probably. This will not affect the new bots, and in general, I will simply reduce the number of permanent tokens.

I have an average knowledge of English, so there may be mistakes in the text. Don't judge it harshly, but rather point it out. I'll fix it as soon as I can.
